title: Preserving morphology while extracting DNA: a non-destructive protocol for slide-mounted specimens
author: Jaume-Schinkel, Santiago
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Figure 4 A. Total morphological changes occurred during DNA extraction; B. DNA concentration (ng/ml) obtained during DNA extraction. Significance values obtained from Kruskal-Wallis test with post-hoc Dunn test, Bonferroni corrected. Values: NS = not significant, **** = p < 0.0001. The Red dashed line indicates the mean and the blue dashed line indicates the median.
